content:
✅ Why This Works:
• The Meta Title ties into the course’s core thematic structure.
• The Week-Specific Focus provides a poetic but clear direction.
• Ensures clarity without redundancy.

4️⃣ Historical Anchor Section (Fully Developed)

🚀 Now includes:
✔ A specific historical event before the text.
✔ A contemporary event at the time of the text’s publication.
✔ A future projection (How does this theme evolve?)

Example: Week 3 – Political Storytelling & The Novel’s Rise

📅 Past: The execution of Socrates (399 BC) → Early tension between storytelling & politics.
📅 Present (At the Novel’s Birth): The rise of serialized fiction (1800s) → Novels as political tools.
📅 Future Projection: The role of AI in shaping political narratives.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 27 (chunk 27/555)
